src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the maximum number of retry attempts from 3 to 5 to handle transient API failures more robustly.
Add informational logging when a successful response is received from the API to aid in debugging.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: log.info("Successfully received response from Gemini API on attempt {}", attempt);

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Extract the HTTP status code into a local variable to avoid repeated method calls and improve readability.
Implement specific exponential backoff logic for 503 Service Unavailable errors to handle API overload gracefully.
Increase the base backoff time for generic HTTP errors from 300ms to 500ms per attempt.
Increase the base backoff time for transport errors from 300ms to 500ms per attempt.
